requirement_topic.en: ECAE PVoC Import Conformity for BESS Products
requirement_topic.zh: BESS 产品的 ECAE PVoC 进口合格评定
requirement_topic.zht: BESS 產品的 ECAE PVoC 進口合格評定

summary.en: The Ethiopian Conformity Assessment Enterprise (ECAE) administers the PVoC programme under Regulation No. 549/2024, which expanded coverage to additional product categories in May 2024. BESS products, including battery modules, inverters, and system-level assemblies, may fall within regulated categories depending on power rating and product classification. Exporters should confirm the current PVoC scope for BESS with ECAE or an authorised inspection body (such as TÜV Rheinland or Cotecna) before shipment. Where in scope, a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) is required for customs clearance in Ethiopia.
summary.zh: 埃塞俄比亚合格评定企业（ECAE）依据第 549/2024 号法规管理 PVoC 计划，该法规于 2024 年 5 月将覆盖范围扩展至更多产品类别。储能电池系统（BESS）产品，包括电池模块、逆变器和系统级组件，可能根据功率等级和产品分类而属于受监管类别。出口商在出货前应向 ECAE 或授权检验机构（如 TÜV Rheinland 或 Cotecna）确认 BESS 当前的 PVoC 范围。如属范围内，埃塞俄比亚清关须持有合格证书（CoC）。
summary.zht: 衣索比亞合格評定企業（ECAE）依據第 549/2024 號法規管理 PVoC 計畫，該法規於 2024 年 5 月將覆蓋範圍擴展至更多產品類別。儲能電池系統（BESS）產品，包括電池模組、逆變器和系統級組件，可能根據功率等級和產品分類而屬於受監管類別。出口商在出貨前應向 ECAE 或授權檢驗機構（如 TÜV Rheinland 或 Cotecna）確認 BESS 當前的 PVoC 範圍。如屬範圍內，衣索比亞清關須持有合格證書（CoC）。

standards_or_laws: Ethiopian Conformity Assessment Enterprise (ECAE) PVoC programme
IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 series (safety and performance — referenced for BESS conformity evidence)

summary.en: Chinese BESS products are typically documented against GB 44240-2024 (safety requirements for electrochemical energy storage stations) and GB/T 36276-2023 (lithium-ion battery for electric energy storage). These domestic standards provide technical evidence for due diligence but are not accepted as substitutes for the ECAE PVoC CoC at the Ethiopian port of import.
summary.zh: 中国 BESS 产品通常依据 GB 44240-2024（电化学储能电站安全要求）和 GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）进行文件化。这些国内标准可提供尽调所需的技术证据，但不能替代埃塞俄比亚进口口岸要求的 ECAE PVoC CoC。
summary.zht: 中國 BESS 產品通常依據 GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能電站安全要求）和 GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）進行文件化。這些國內標準可提供盡調所需的技術證據，但不能替代衣索比亞進口口岸要求的 ECAE PVoC CoC。

gap.en: Before finalising the shipment plan, verify with ECAE or an authorised inspection body whether the BESS product category and power rating are in PVoC scope. If in scope, engage the inspection body for pre-export inspection in China, obtain the CoC, and include IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 test evidence in the application package.
gap.zh: 在最终确定出货计划前，应向 ECAE 或授权检验机构确认 BESS 产品类别和功率等级是否在 PVoC 范围内。如在范围内，应委托检验机构在中国进行出口前检验，取得 CoC，并在申请资料包中附上 IEC 62619 和 IEC 62933 测试证据。
gap.zht: 在最終確定出貨計畫前，應向 ECAE 或授權檢驗機構確認 BESS 產品類別和功率等級是否在 PVoC 範圍內。如在範圍內，應委託檢驗機構在中國進行出口前檢驗，取得 CoC，並在申請資料包中附上 IEC 62619 和 IEC 62933 測試證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for BESS product categories within ECAE PVoC scope; scope should be confirmed with ECAE or an authorised inspection body
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent mandatory pre-export verification for the domestic Chinese market; exporters must comply with destination-country conformity requirements

source.publisher: Cotecna (ECAE-authorised inspection body, Ethiopia CoC services)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Confirm PVoC scope for BESS before shipping. Where in scope, a CoC from an authorised body is required for Ethiopia customs clearance. IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 evidence strengthens the application.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 出货前确认 BESS 的 PVoC 范围。如在范围内，埃塞俄比亚海关清关须持有授权机构出具的 CoC。IEC 62619 和 IEC 62933 证据可强化申请。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 出貨前確認 BESS 的 PVoC 範圍。如在範圍內，衣索比亞海關清關須持有授權機構出具的 CoC。IEC 62619 和 IEC 62933 證據可強化申請。

requirement_topic.en: IEC 62619 Battery Safety and IEC 62933 System Performance Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62619 电池安全与 IEC 62933 系统性能证据
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62619 電池安全與 IEC 62933 系統性能證據

summary.en: IEC 62619:2022 specifies safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in industrial applications, covering the battery pack and BMS. IEC 62933-2-1 and IEC 62933-5-2 address system-level safety and grid-integration safety for electrical energy storage systems. These standards are the internationally recognised framework for BESS safety and performance evidence referenced by ECAE inspection bodies and project owners in Ethiopia. Third-party test reports or certificates to IEC 62619 from an accredited laboratory are commonly required by project owners, EPC contractors, financiers, and insurers for Ethiopian BESS projects.
summary.zh: IEC 62619:2022 规定了工业应用二次锂电芯和电池（含电池包和 BMS）的安全要求。IEC 62933-2-1 和 IEC 62933-5-2 涉及电化学储能系统的系统级安全和并网安全。这些标准是 ECAE 检验机构和埃塞俄比亚项目业主参照的 BESS 安全与性能证据的国际公认框架。认可实验室出具的 IEC 62619 第三方测试报告或证书通常为埃塞俄比亚 BESS 项目的项目业主、EPC 承包商、融资方和保险方所要求。
summary.zht: IEC 62619:2022 規定了工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池（含電池包和 BMS）的安全要求。IEC 62933-2-1 和 IEC 62933-5-2 涉及電化學儲能系統的系統級安全和併網安全。這些標準是 ECAE 檢驗機構和衣索比亞專案業主參照的 BESS 安全與性能證據的國際公認框架。認可實驗室出具的 IEC 62619 第三方測試報告或證書通常為衣索比亞 BESS 專案的專案業主、EPC 承包商、融資方和保險方所要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in industrial applications
IEC 62933-2-1 — Electrical energy storage systems — Unit parameters and testing methods — Part 2-1: Safety requirements for grid-integrated electrical energy storage systems
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical energy storage systems — Safety requirements for grid-integrated electrical energy storage systems — Particular requirements for lithium-ion-based systems

summary.en: Chinese BESS manufacturers typically document battery safety against GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023. Where the manufacturer also holds an IEC 62619 report from an accredited laboratory, that report directly supports the Ethiopia project file. GB 44240-2024 alone is not treated as equivalent to IEC 62619 by international project owners or ECAE inspection bodies.
summary.zh: 中国 BESS 制造商通常依据 GB 44240-2024 和 GB/T 36276-2023 对电池安全进行文件化。如制造商同时持有认可实验室出具的 IEC 62619 报告，该报告可直接支持埃塞俄比亚项目文件。国际项目业主或 ECAE 检验机构不将 GB 44240-2024 单独视为 IEC 62619 的等效文件。
summary.zht: 中國 BESS 製造商通常依據 GB 44240-2024 和 GB/T 36276-2023 對電池安全進行文件化。如製造商同時持有認可實驗室出具的 IEC 62619 報告，該報告可直接支持衣索比亞專案文件。國際專案業主或 ECAE 檢驗機構不將 GB 44240-2024 單獨視為 IEC 62619 的等效文件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619 (where held by the Chinese manufacturer)

gap.en: Obtain a current IEC 62619 test report or certificate from an accredited laboratory for the specific battery cell and pack configuration. For system-level projects, prepare IEC 62933 series evidence covering BMS, thermal management, and grid-integration safety. Confirm scope covers the Ethiopia market configuration before relying on an existing certificate.
gap.zh: 应从认可实验室获取针对特定电芯和电池包配置的现行 IEC 62619 测试报告或证书。对于系统级项目，应准备涵盖 BMS、热管理和并网安全的 IEC 62933 系列证据。在依赖现有证书前，确认证书范围覆盖面向埃塞俄比亚市场的配置。
gap.zht: 應從認可實驗室獲取針對特定電芯和電池包配置的現行 IEC 62619 測試報告或證書。對於系統級專案，應準備涵蓋 BMS、熱管理和併網安全的 IEC 62933 系列證據。在依賴現有證書前，確認證書範圍覆蓋面向衣索比亞市場的配置。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary as standalone standards but practically required by ECAE inspection bodies, project owners, financiers, and insurers for BESS projects in Ethiopia
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are the domestic mandatory/recommended equivalents; IEC 62619 is voluntary in China but required for many export markets

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62619 battery safety evidence and IEC 62933 system-level evidence are practically required for Ethiopia BESS project acceptance and PVoC clearance support. GB 44240-2024 alone is not sufficient for international project and financing review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 62619 电池安全证据和 IEC 62933 系统级证据在实践中是埃塞俄比亚 BESS 项目验收和 PVoC 清关支持的必要条件。GB 44240-2024 单独不足以满足国际项目和融资审查要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 62619 電池安全證據和 IEC 62933 系統級證據在實踐中是衣索比亞 BESS 專案驗收和 PVoC 清關支持的必要條件。GB 44240-2024 單獨不足以滿足國際專案和融資審查要求。

requirement_topic.en: UN 38.3 Transport Testing for Lithium Battery BESS Shipments
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电池储能系统出货的 UN 38.3 运输测试
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電池儲能系統出貨的 UN 38.3 運輸測試

summary.en: UN 38.3 (Part III, Section 38.3 of the UN Manual of Tests and Criteria) specifies eight tests for lithium metal and lithium-ion cells and batteries to be transported safely by air, sea, or land. Passing UN 38.3 is mandatory for international transport of all lithium batteries under the IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR), IMDG Code, and ADR. Since January 2020, a UN 38.3 Test Summary document must be provided along the supply chain. BESS lithium battery modules and cells shipped from China to Ethiopia must comply with the applicable dangerous-goods transport regulations for the chosen shipping mode.
summary.zh: UN 38.3（联合国《关于危险货物运输的建议书：试验和标准手册》第三部分第 38.3 节）规定了锂金属和锂离子电芯及电池经空运、海运或陆运安全运输所需的八项测试。根据 IATA 危险货物条例（DGR）、IMDG 规则和 ADR，通过 UN 38.3 是所有锂电池国际运输的强制要求。自 2020 年 1 月起，UN 38.3 测试摘要文件须随供应链传递。从中国运往埃塞俄比亚的储能电池系统锂电池模块和电芯须符合所选运输方式的适用危险货物运输法规。
summary.zht: UN 38.3（聯合國《關於危險貨物運輸的建議書：試驗和標準手冊》第三部分第 38.3 節）規定了鋰金屬和鋰離子電芯及電池經空運、海運或陸運安全運輸所需的八項測試。根據 IATA 危險貨物條例（DGR）、IMDG 規則和 ADR，通過 UN 38.3 是所有鋰電池國際運輸的強制要求。自 2020 年 1 月起，UN 38.3 測試摘要文件須隨供應鏈傳遞。從中國運往衣索比亞的儲能電池系統鋰電池模組和電芯須符合所選運輸方式的適用危險貨物運輸法規。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria — Part III, Section 38.3 (UN 38.3)
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR) — lithium battery provisions
IMDG Code — Class 9 dangerous goods, lithium battery packing instructions
ADR — dangerous goods road transport, where applicable for inland segments

summary.en: Chinese lithium battery manufacturers exporting BESS products internationally are expected to hold UN 38.3 test reports from accredited laboratories. China's domestic GB/T 36276-2023 and GB 44240-2024 cover cell and system safety but do not substitute for UN 38.3 transport testing required by international dangerous-goods transport regulations.
summary.zh: 出口 BESS 产品的中国锂电池制造商通常须持有认可实验室出具的 UN 38.3 测试报告。中国国内的 GB/T 36276-2023 和 GB 44240-2024 涵盖电芯和系统安全，但不能替代国际危险货物运输法规所要求的 UN 38.3 运输测试。
summary.zht: 出口 BESS 產品的中國鋰電池製造商通常須持有認可實驗室出具的 UN 38.3 測試報告。中國國內的 GB/T 36276-2023 和 GB 44240-2024 涵蓋電芯和系統安全，但不能替代國際危險貨物運輸法規所要求的 UN 38.3 運輸測試。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 (required for international transport regardless of domestic standard)

gap.en: Obtain and retain UN 38.3 test reports and the mandatory Test Summary for each lithium cell and battery type in the BESS shipment. Ensure the shipping documentation, labelling, packing, and SDS comply with IATA DGR or IMDG Code for the chosen transport mode. Provide the Test Summary to all parties in the supply chain as required since January 2020.
gap.zh: 应为储能电池系统货物中每种锂电芯和电池类型取得并留存 UN 38.3 测试报告和强制性测试摘要。确保运输文件、标签、包装和安全数据表符合所选运输方式的 IATA DGR 或 IMDG 规则要求。根据自 2020 年 1 月起的规定，向供应链中所有相关方提供测试摘要。
gap.zht: 應為儲能電池系統貨物中每種鋰電芯和電池類型取得並留存 UN 38.3 測試報告和強制性測試摘要。確保運輸文件、標籤、包裝和安全數據表符合所選運輸方式的 IATA DGR 或 IMDG 規則要求。根據自 2020 年 1 月起的規定，向供應鏈中所有相關方提供測試摘要。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for international transport of lithium batteries under IATA DGR, IMDG Code, and ADR; applies to all BESS lithium cell and battery shipments from China to Ethiopia regardless of destination-country standards
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese exporters shipping lithium batteries internationally under the same IATA, IMDG, and ADR transport regulations

source.publisher: JJR Laboratory — UN 38.3 Lithium Battery Shipping Compliance Guide

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 transport testing is mandatory for all lithium battery BESS shipments to Ethiopia by air, sea, or land. Obtain and distribute the Test Summary along the supply chain. Non-compliance risks shipment rejection, dangerous-goods penalty, or cargo detention.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3 运输测试对所有经空运、海运或陆运发往埃塞俄比亚的锂电池储能系统货物属于强制要求。取得测试摘要并沿供应链分发。不合规可能导致货物被拒、危险货物处罚或货物扣押。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3 運輸測試對所有經空運、海運或陸運發往衣索比亞的鋰電池儲能系統貨物屬於強制要求。取得測試摘要並沿供應鏈分發。不合規可能導致貨物被拒、危險貨物處罰或貨物扣押。

requirement_topic.en: Ethiopian Energy Authority Grid Approval for BESS Connected to the EEU Network
requirement_topic.zh: 接入 EEU 电网的储能系统所需的埃塞俄比亚能源局并网批准
requirement_topic.zht: 接入 EEU 電網的儲能系統所需的衣索比亞能源局併網批准

summary.en: BESS projects connected to the Ethiopian Electric Utility (EEU) distribution network or the Ethiopian Electric Power (EEP) transmission network require Ethiopian Energy Authority (EEA) licensing and EEU/EEP technical review. The Ethiopia National Distribution Grid Code (ENDGC) and Ethiopia National Transmission Grid Code (ENTGC) set technical connection requirements including voltage, frequency (50 Hz), protection co-ordination, control interface, and safety. Battery storage systems that provide grid services, capacity firming, or arbitrage connected to the EEU network must satisfy these requirements in addition to product-level safety certification.
summary.zh: 接入埃塞俄比亚电力公用事业公司（EEU）配电网或埃塞俄比亚电力公司（EEP）输电网的 BESS 项目，须取得埃塞俄比亚能源局（EEA）许可并通过 EEU/EEP 技术审查。埃塞俄比亚国家配电网规范（ENDGC）和国家输电网规范（ENTGC）规定了技术接入要求，包括电压、频率（50 Hz）、保护配合、控制接口和安全。为接入 EEU 电网提供电网服务、容量支撑或套利的电池储能系统，除产品级安全认证外，还须满足上述要求。
summary.zht: 接入衣索比亞電力公用事業公司（EEU）配電網或衣索比亞電力公司（EEP）輸電網的 BESS 專案，須取得衣索比亞能源局（EEA）許可並通過 EEU/EEP 技術審查。衣索比亞國家配電網規範（ENDGC）和國家輸電網規範（ENTGC）規定了技術接入要求，包括電壓、頻率（50 Hz）、保護配合、控制接口和安全。為接入 EEU 電網提供電網服務、容量支撐或套利的電池儲能系統，除產品級安全認證外，還須滿足上述要求。

summary.en: Chinese BESS grid-connection evidence is based on GB/T 36558-2023 (general technical requirements for battery energy storage connected to power system) and utility-specific EMS and protection settings. These records address Chinese grid requirements and do not establish EEA or EEU connection approval for Ethiopian projects.
summary.zh: 中国 BESS 并网证据依据 GB/T 36558-2023（电力储能用电池管理系统技术条件）以及电网企业特定的 EMS 和保护参数设置。这些记录针对中国电网要求，不能证明埃塞俄比亚项目的 EEA 或 EEU 接入批准。
summary.zht: 中國 BESS 併網證據依據 GB/T 36558-2023（電力儲能用電池管理系統技術條件）以及電網企業特定的 EMS 和保護參數設置。這些記錄針對中國電網要求，不能證明衣索比亞專案的 EEA 或 EEU 接入批准。

standards_or_laws: Chinese utility EMS and protection parameter sheets

gap.en: Engage EEA and EEU early for BESS project licensing and grid-connection review. Prepare Ethiopia-specific technical documentation: 50 Hz grid settings, protection co-ordination studies, BMS control interface, EMS integration plan, commissioning and testing plan, and site-specific safety assessment. Product-level certificates do not replace EEA project licensing or EEU connection agreement.
gap.zh: 尽早与 EEA 和 EEU 接洽，办理 BESS 项目许可和并网审查。准备埃塞俄比亚专项技术文件：50 Hz 电网参数、保护配合研究、BMS 控制接口、EMS 集成方案、调试与测试计划，以及场站专项安全评估。产品级证书不能替代 EEA 项目许可或 EEU 接入协议。
gap.zht: 盡早與 EEA 和 EEU 接洽，辦理 BESS 專案許可和併網審查。準備衣索比亞專項技術文件：50 Hz 電網參數、保護配合研究、BMS 控制接口、EMS 整合方案、調試與測試計畫，以及場站專項安全評估。產品級證書不能替代 EEA 專案許可或 EEU 接入協議。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for BESS projects connected to or providing services to the EEU distribution network or EEP transmission network; off-grid or behind-the-meter systems may follow different requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese domestic grid approval is not accepted as EEA or EEU connection approval for Ethiopia projects

source.publisher: ICLG — Renewable Energy Laws and Regulations Report 2026: Ethiopia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] BESS projects connected to the EEU grid require separate EEA licensing and EEU connection review. Product-level safety certificates address import clearance, not project-level grid approval. Build an Ethiopia-specific project connection pack.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接入 EEU 电网的 BESS 项目须单独取得 EEA 许可和 EEU 接入审查批准。产品级安全证书解决的是进口清关问题，而非项目级并网批准。应建立埃塞俄比亚专项项目接入资料包。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接入 EEU 電網的 BESS 專案須單獨取得 EEA 許可和 EEU 接入審查批准。產品級安全證書解決的是進口清關問題，而非專案級併網批准。應建立衣索比亞專項專案接入資料包。
